name: Twilight Express
short_description: A short novel about travelling by train. Become the one who (not)helps three girls to get to the final destination at the sea.
detailed_description:
A short novel about travelling by train. Become the one who (not)helps three girls to get to the final destination at the sea.

Each of us strives to reach the right station, but sometimes it's better for life to get off early. Talk to your fellow travellers, make choices and decide if the girls should get off the train.

Game Features:.
  • Approximately 1 hour of gameplay;
  • Pixel style;
  • 8-bit musical accompaniment.
